# kCVImageBufferFieldDetailSpatialFirstLineLate

**Global Variable**

A key to the spatial first line late detail field of the image buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCVImageBufferFieldDetailSpatialFirstLineLate: CFString
```

## Discussion

The spatial first line early detail field value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString]. The image buffer contains interleaved fields. The first line of image data corresponds to the first bottom, even-numbered, field.

## Constants

- **kCVImageBufferFieldDetailTemporalTopFirst**: A key to the temporal top first detail field of the image buffer.
- **kCVImageBufferFieldDetailTemporalBottomFirst**: A key to the temporal bottom first detail field of the image buffer.
- **kCVImageBufferFieldDetailSpatialFirstLineEarly**: A key to the spatial first line early detail field of the image buffer.
